creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Wed Oct  9 16:29:29 2013
New Revision: 329910
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/329910

Log:
  - Update to version 3.2.4
  - Add stage support
  
  PR:		ports/182804
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>
  Approved by:	wg/culot (mentors, implicit)

Modified:
  head/devel/zmq-devel/Makefile
  head/devel/zmq-devel/distinfo
  head/devel/zmq-devel/files/patch-tests__test_connect_delay.cpp
  head/devel/zmq-devel/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/zmq-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/zmq-devel/Makefile	Wed Oct  9 16:16:48 2013	(r329909)
+++ head/devel/zmq-devel/Makefile	Wed Oct  9 16:29:29 2013	(r329910)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	zmq
-PORTVERSION=	3.2.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	devel net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.zeromq.org/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-devel
@@ -10,67 +10,14 @@ DISTNAME=	zeromq-${DISTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Open source message queue optimised for performance
 
+USES=		pathfix
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-USES=	pathfix
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--disable-silent-rules
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
 CONFLICTS=	zmq-[0-9]*
 
-MAN7=	\
-	zmq_pgm.7 \
-	zmq_ipc.7 \
-	zmq_epgm.7 \
-	zmq_tcp.7 \
-	zmq.7 \
-	zmq_inproc.7
-
-MAN3=	\
-	zmq_bind.3 \
-	zmq_close.3 \
-	zmq_connect.3 \
-	zmq_ctx_destroy.3 \
-	zmq_ctx_get.3 \
-	zmq_ctx_new.3 \
-	zmq_ctx_set.3 \
-	zmq_disconnect.3 \
-	zmq_errno.3 \
-	zmq_getsockopt.3 \
-	zmq_init.3 \
-	zmq_msg_close.3 \
-	zmq_msg_copy.3 \
-	zmq_msg_data.3 \
-	zmq_msg_get.3 \
-	zmq_msg_init.3 \
-	zmq_msg_init_data.3 \
-	zmq_msg_init_size.3 \
-	zmq_msg_more.3 \
-	zmq_msg_move.3 \
-	zmq_msg_recv.3 \
-	zmq_msg_send.3 \
-	zmq_msg_set.3 \
-	zmq_msg_size.3 \
-	zmq_poll.3 \
-	zmq_proxy.3 \
-	zmq_recv.3 \
-	zmq_recvmsg.3 \
-	zmq_send.3 \
-	zmq_sendmsg.3 \
-	zmq_setsockopt.3 \
-	zmq_socket.3 \
-	zmq_socket_monitor.3 \
-	zmq_strerror.3 \
-	zmq_term.3 \
-	zmq_unbind.3 \
-	zmq_version.3
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 regression-test:
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${MAKE}	check
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
-.if defined(CC) && ${CC:T:M*clang*} == "clang" || ${OSVERSION} >= 1000024
-CXXFLAGS+=	-Wno-mismatched-tags
-.endif
-
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/devel/zmq-devel/distinfo	Wed Oct  9 16:16:48 2013	(r329909)
+++ head/devel/zmq-devel/distinfo	Wed Oct  9 16:29:29 2013	(r329910)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (zeromq-3.2.3.tar.gz) = e134c1aaf829dd77bca9dc0fa199ba31095a581bd0d3dda5fc59523b9f401238
-SIZE (zeromq-3.2.3.tar.gz) = 2072758
+SHA256 (zeromq-3.2.4.tar.gz) = df96a141c85b65c2cb6c0db22223126623a09eecbfccb7f74400f3f938742f59
+SIZE (zeromq-3.2.4.tar.gz) = 2083123

==============================================================================
--- head/devel/zmq-devel/files/patch-tests__test_connect_delay.cpp	Wed Oct  9 16:16:48 2013	(r329909)
+++ head/devel/zmq-devel/files/patch-tests__test_connect_delay.cpp	Wed Oct  9 16:29:29 2013	(r329910)
@@ -1,9 +1,10 @@
 --- ./tests/test_connect_delay.cpp.orig	2013-07-19 13:30:55.436108722 +0400
 +++ ./tests/test_connect_delay.cpp	2013-07-19 13:30:59.430156726 +0400
-@@ -257,4 +257,4 @@
-     
-     rc = zmq_ctx_destroy(context2);
-     assert (rc == 0);
--}
-\ No newline at end of file
-+}
+@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@
+ #include <stdlib.h>
+ #include <string.h>
+ #include <unistd.h>
++#include <time.h>
+ #include <string>
+ 
+ #undef NDEBUG
